blocked_by_gate_questions.question: Read public marketplace/category pages to compare demand signals, saturation, price bands, and buyer language.
Review seller terms, tax/KYC/payment setup, refund obligations, and platform fees.
Create, publish, update, or promote a marketplace listing or public product page.
Create seller accounts, connect payouts, accept agreements, or configure payment settings.

completeness_checks.evidence: Revision pass includes six revised file drafts.
One filled example is included for a hypothetical solo AI-builder launch.
README and filled example name a solo AI-builder buyer and local pre-launch job.
Draft avoids revenue, payout, buyer-count, and live-demand claims.
Boundary terms are present across README, QA, private listing, and scorecard drafts.
Revision validation reports zero placeholder stubs.
Scorecard covers usefulness, clarity, boundary safety, and next revision.
All browser, marketplace, account, legal, payment, wallet, API, and public actions remain gated.

next_action: Prepare a local gate-decision packet that compares continue-local, request read-only browser approval, request legal/payment review, or pause; do not perform any external validation.
summary: Completed a local revised-package completeness check for the AI builder launch checklist pack. The revised package has six local file drafts, one filled example, explicit gates, and no placeholder stubs.
